settings.title: System Settings
settings.backup_desc: Export the entire database to safely store it manually on your computer or an external drive.
settings.vacuum_desc: Cleans up unused data blocks in the background and reduces database size, making the application faster. (Recommended once a month)
settings.cloud_sync_desc: When you select the sync folder of Google Drive, Dropbox, or OneDrive on your computer, the application autonomously takes a background backup when closing.
settings.company_logo_help: * In PNG or JPG format. Automatically optimized.
settings.delete_work_type_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this study type? Since the calculations in old scorecards are saved in the database, your historical data will not be corrupted.
settings.delete_group_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this group? Workers in the group will have their group assignments removed (Workers will not be deleted).
settings.backup_db_desc: It transfers your entire system (as a .sqlite database file) to your local disk. You can use it for computer replacement or backup.
settings.vacuum_db_desc: It clears database spaces created by emptied or deleted records, reclaims disk space and increases query speeds.
settings.restore_db_desc: Drag and drop the .sqlite file here (Application will restart automatically)
settings.restore_confirm: Are you sure you want to restore the database? All your existing data will be deleted!
settings.restore_invalid_file: Please drag a valid SQLite (.sqlite or .db) database file.

dashboard.title: Personnel Management
dashboard.empty_state_sub: Click the button on the top right to add your first personnel.
dashboard.help_desc: The Personnel Management panel allows you to track timesheets, earnings, advances, and payment details of your workers.
dashboard.help_p1: Add individual workers using the top right button or import a batch list by downloading the Excel template.
dashboard.help_p2: Analyze expenses and worker counts by group category (e.g., Electricians, Ironworkers).
dashboard.help_p3: Click any worker's name to view their timesheets, calculate new balances, and export detailed PDF statements.

table.empty: No transactions found in this date range.

worker_profile.no_period_data: No transactions found in this period.
worker_profile.auto_deduct_notice: * The given advance will be automatically deducted from Cash (Cash Out).
worker_profile.whatsapp_no_phone: Personnel's registered phone number not found.
worker_profile.help_desc: The worker profile displays all financial and working history of the selected employee on a single screen.
worker_profile.help_p1: Quickly enter daily timesheet records (standard hours or overtime) and cash advance logs.
worker_profile.help_p2: Generate date-range filtered statement reports that automatically calculate the carried over balance.
worker_profile.help_p3: Generate and share branded, official PDF statements complete with your company logo.

cash.title: Cash Management
cash.help_desc: Cash Register is used to log all cash inflows and outflows on your construction site.
cash.help_p1: Record incomes (+) and expenses (-). Worker advances are automatically deducted from the register.
cash.help_p2: Track total incomes, total expenses, labor costs, and monthly net cash changes instantly.
cash.help_p3: Filter cash logs by date range or transaction type, and download reports in Excel or PDF formats.

common.welcome_msg: To be able to enter records or manage personnel, please create a new Construction Site from the left menu or select an active workspace.
common.select_project_msg: Please select an active construction site from the left menu or from the Construction Site Management page.

about.title: About & Help
about.faq_no_results: No questions found matching your search criteria.
about.faq_q1: How is the cash balance calculated?
about.faq_a1: The cash balance is calculated instantly by subtracting Cash Outflows from total Cash Inflows. Advances to workers are automatically counted as cash outflows.
about.faq_q2: How does the time machine (Backup) work?
about.faq_a2: You can perform a 'Full Backup' from Settings. Also, the system creates an automatic restore point (snapshot) during bulk Excel data imports.
about.faq_q3: What should I pay attention to when importing personnel from Excel?
about.faq_a3: Fill in the downloaded template without changing the column headers. You must enter a valid 11-digit number in the TC Identity field.
about.faq_a4: Deleted timesheet and advance calculations are only moved to the 'Trash' (Soft Delete). They can be recovered with advanced database interventions.
about.err_name_empty: Row {line}: Full Name cannot be empty.
about.hero_title: Electronic Journal Ledger: Digital Trust and Transparency for Your Construction Site
about.hero_subtitle: The Future of Construction Site Management, Today's Reality.
about.hero_desc: Traditional journal ledgers wear out in the intense work tempo of the field, are prone to calculation errors, and cause confusions that damage the trust between worker and employer. Electronic Journal Ledger is a next-generation financial management assistant that elevates this chaotic process to millimeter precision and corporate discipline.
about.section_aim_title: What is the Aim of This Project?
about.section_aim_desc: The main goal of our project is to digitize the timesheets (daily work records), advance payments, and cash movements of construction site and field workers. We aim to eliminate the burden of complex accounting software while maximizing the practicality offered by physical ledgers. Whether you are a small team of 5 or a large construction crew of 100; all your data is now mathematically flawless, reportable, and accessible.
about.section_why_title: Why Should You Choose "Electronic Journal Ledger"?
about.why_1_desc: Thanks to the advanced "Audit Log" system, you can instantly see who made every past change, when, and how. No room for surprises; every penny is accounted for transparently.
about.why_2_desc: We completely end the "how much am I owed?" argument between you and your workers. With reports specially generated for each worker, calculating the carried over balance and filtered by date range, professional agreements are just a click away.
about.why_3_desc: Your application is designed to run flawlessly for years without the need for developer intervention. It optimizes its own database, autonomously sends backups to the cloud, and constantly checks system health.
about.why_4_desc: With 10 different language supports, letterhead PDF reports featuring your company logo, and modern "Dark/Light Theme" options, your application represents your corporate identity at the highest level in the field or in the office.
about.why_5_desc: The system proactively tracks critical situations such as "worker falling into negative balance" or "passive personnel with no transactions for a long time" on your behalf, and warns you.
about.how_subtitle: The application is developed with the "Set and Forget" principle:
about.how_1_desc: Whether you enter personnel-based timesheets or make cash inflows/outflows to the register. Our smart forms prevent you from entering incorrect data.
about.how_2_desc: Examine the cost analysis of groups (Electricians, Ironworkers, etc.) via the Dashboard.
about.how_3_desc: Download the data you need in Excel, PDF, or JSON format. Share it with your worker or transfer it to another accounting system.
about.how_4_desc: All your transactions are stored encrypted and securely in your local database.
about.conclusion_1: Not just a logbook; the financial memory of your construction site.
about.conclusion_2: Electronic Journal Ledger is designed to simplify complexity and let you focus on your work. Increase the abundance of your business with the trust of technology.
about.faq_q5: If I format my computer or delete the application, will my data be lost? How to Backup and Restore?
about.faq_a5:
Yes, since the application works offline-first, all your data is stored on your local computer. To protect your data before formatting:

1. Take your backup by clicking the "Backup Entire Database (.sqlite)" button on the Settings -> System Security page.
2. Restore your system autonomously by opening the application on the new computer and dragging and dropping this .sqlite file into the "Restore Backup Database" field on the Settings page (the application will automatically overwrite the backup and restart).
about.faq_q6: How does Local Area Network (LAN) Mobile Photo Uploader work?
about.faq_a6: When you press the "Upload from Mobile (QR)" button while adding Material Delivery Note or Quality Control Reports, the application opens a temporary local network server (LAN Express server) on your computer. When you scan the QR code with your phone, the delivery note images you take with your phone camera are uploaded directly to the application on your computer without internet / cloud costs.
about.faq_q7: Where to get weather information from construction site logbooks?
about.faq_a7: When you open the Daily Journal tab after entering the location information of your construction site (e.g. "Istanbul, TR") on the Construction Site Management page, the system automatically retrieves the day's weather temperature and status information autonomously according to the location of the construction site via the OpenWeather API. In case there is no internet, the system assigns realistic simulated values.

projects.title: Construction Site (Location) Management
projects.empty_state: No registered construction site found. You can add your first construction site from the form above.
projects.help_desc: Site Management allows you to add and manage different projects or locations.
projects.help_p1: Select a project to set it as active. All transactions and reports will belong to this project.
projects.help_p2: Specify a location (e.g., 'Istanbul, TR') to automatically retrieve daily weather conditions.
projects.help_p3: Instantly search across construction sites and list projects efficiently using pagination.

filters.search_journal: Search in journal notes, weather or date...

media.help_desc: Site Media Gallery aggregates all photos uploaded through Delivery Notes and Quality Control.
media.help_p1: Browse all construction site images sorted chronologically from newest to oldest.
media.help_p2: Click any photo to see it in full size and view the associated delivery note or quality report.
media.help_p3: Filter media by type (Delivery Note photos vs. Quality Control photos) or search by notes.

subcontractor.title: 🚜 Subcontractor Ledgers
subcontractor.name: Subcontractor Name / Title
subcontractor.help_desc: Subcontractor Ledgers are used to track daily rates, services and contact details of subcontractors or hired machinery working on your construction site.
subcontractor.help_p1: The daily rate defined for each subcontractor is taken as the baseline for their scorecards and monthly statements.
subcontractor.help_p2: You can perform real-time searches in the subcontractor list by name, service or phone, and easily navigate large records with pagination.
subcontractor.help_p3: You can update subcontractor titles, phone numbers and daily rates at any time using the 'Edit' button.
subcontractor.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this subcontractor ledger? This action cannot be undone.
subcontractor.no_results: No subcontractors found matching the search criteria.
subcontractor.empty_state: No subcontractors registered for this construction site yet.

quality.title: 🛡️ Quality Control & Site Reports
quality.report_title_ph: e.g. 3rd Floor Axis Shift / Incorrect Mold Installation
quality.no_results: No reports found matching the search criteria.
quality.empty_state: No quality control reports found for this construction site yet.
quality.upload_mobile_desc: Connect your phone and computer to the **same WiFi network**, then scan the QR code below with your camera:
quality.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this quality control report? This action cannot be undone.
quality.help_desc: Quality Control module is used to log structural issues, safety findings, and site reports.
quality.help_p1: Log reports as 'OPEN' initially, and update them to 'RESOLVED' once the technical issue is solved.
quality.help_p2: Attach photos of identified issues and write detailed solution plans in the description area.
quality.help_p3: Filter reports by resolution status or photo availability to track pending issues.

journal.title: 📓 Site Daily Journal
journal.notes_ph: e.g. 2nd floor column irons tied, C30 concrete poured...
journal.weather_no_location: Could not retrieve weather since site location is not specified.
journal.no_results: No journal entries found matching the search criteria.
journal.empty_state: No daily journal entries found yet.
journal.help_desc: The Daily Journal is the official log where you chronologically archive daily field activities, working personnel counts, and weather conditions.
journal.help_p1: When the location is specified on the Project page, the system automatically fetches the weather and temperature via OpenWeather API.
journal.help_p2: The total worker count active on that date is automatically calculated from timesheets and reflected on the form.
journal.help_p3: To maintain historical data integrity, daily journals can only be edited on the day they are created. Older entries are locked.
journal.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this daily journal entry? This action cannot be undone.

materials.no_results: No delivery notes found matching the search criteria.
materials.upload_mobile_desc: Connect your phone and computer to the **same WiFi network**, then scan the QR code with your camera:
